items.caption: A close-up view of a storm drain, which is a crucial part of urban infrastructure designed to manage rainwater runoff. the drain is set into a concrete curb, and the surrounding area is covered in grass, indicating a suburban or residential setting. a sign is also visible in the image, which reads "adopt a storm drain," suggesting that the local community is actively engaged in maintaining and protecting their storm drains. the sign is placed on the grass, close to the drain, making it easily noticeable to passersby. the overall scene conveys a sense of civic responsibility and environmental stewardship.
